The Hard Truth

The system was never designed to make you rich.

Your cash investment grows at 7% per year — on a good year. Meanwhile, real estate investors are compounding at 13–15% IRR with tax advantages that make the IRS work in their favor. That's not luck. That's strategy.

The problem isn't that you don't have enough money. The problem is that nobody has ever shown you where to put it.

📉
Your savings are falling behind inflationA savings account at 4.5% doesn't beat 5%+ inflation. You're moving backward in slow motion.
🏦
The stock market is a casino you can't controlVolatility, crashes, fees, taxes — you bear all the risk and Wall Street takes the upside.
⏳
Time is your most expensive costEvery year you delay is compounding you'll never get back. The best time was 10 years ago. The next best time is right now.
"Wealth is built by acquiring real assets that produce cash flows — not by working harder forever."
— Grant Cardone, NYT Bestselling Author & Founder of Cardone Capital

Why Book The Call

In 20 Minutes You'll Know
More Than Most Investors Learn in Years

Our Investor Relations specialists are full-time experts — not generalist salespeople. They invest in our funds too. This is what they cover with you.

🗺️

Your Personal Investment Map

Based on your income, savings, and goals — we'll tell you exactly what options are available to you today, not in 5 years.

💼

How Our Funds Actually Work

No fluff. Real numbers, real structure, real fees, real timelines. You'll understand the investment before you ever commit a dollar.

🧾

Tax Strategies You're Probably Missing

Depreciation, 1031 exchanges, cash deployments — your specialist will walk you through how to make the IRS work for you, not against you.

🏦

Minimum Investment & Entry Points

We'll walk you through exactly how much capital you need to participate, which fund tiers are available, and how to position your cash for the best entry point.

📈

Realistic Return Expectations

We don't promise unicorn numbers. We'll show you historical performance, targeted IRRs, and what a conservative scenario looks like.

🚀

Your Exact First Step

You won't leave the call confused. You'll know precisely what to do next — whether that's investing today or preparing to invest in 90 days.

The Grant Cardone Method

Grant Cardone built a $5B+ real estate empire from scratch — not with inherited wealth or Wall Street connections, but by mastering the fundamentals of multifamily investing and applying them at scale.

Got Questions?

We've Got Answers

100% free. No credit card. No commitment. Our Investor Relations team is here to educate you — not pressure you. An informed investor is the best kind of partner, and we're willing to earn your trust before you ever write a check.
An accredited investor is an individual with an annual income exceeding $200,000 (or $300,000 jointly with a spouse) for the past two years, or a net worth over $1 million excluding their primary residence. Current offerings through Cardone Capital are structured for verified accredited investors pursuant to applicable securities regulations. Our Investor Relations team will walk you through the qualification process — it's straightforward and typically takes just a few minutes.
Minimums vary by fund and are discussed during your investor call. Our specialist will match you to the right fund based on your available capital and financial goals — so you're never pushed into something that doesn't fit your situation.
You'll receive a confirmation email with your time slot and a brief intake form so your specialist can tailor the conversation to your situation. Show up, ask everything on your mind, and leave with a clear picture of your next move — whether that's investing today or preparing to invest in the next 90 days.
Absolutely. The majority of our 20,000+ investors started with little to no experience in private real estate. Our Investor Relations team is trained to meet you exactly where you are — breaking down every concept clearly, without jargon. That's the whole point of the call.

Investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Past performance does not guarantee or indicate future results. Any historical returns, expected returns, or probability projections may not reflect actual future performance. This page is for educational and marketing purposes only and does not constitute investment advice. All securities offerings are conducted pursuant to Rule 506(c) of Regulation D under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended. Investments are available exclusively to verified accredited investors as defined under Rule 501 of Regulation D. This page does not constitute an offer to sell or solicitation of an offer to buy any securities. Any offer or solicitation will be made only through official offering documents to investors who meet applicable suitability requirements. Prospective investors must independently verify their accredited investor status prior to investing. Prospective investors should consult with a tax, legal and/or financial adviser before making any investment decision. For additional important risks and disclosures, please visit cardonecapital.com/disclosures.
